summary: Added the SpecBridge deterministic test phase, including a test matrix, local test results artifact, negative validation runner, and smoke integration for expected failure cases.
policy_result: Passed. Changes add test documentation and a local negative validation runner only. No secrets, production configuration, deployment automation, billing, hosted dashboard implementation, MCP server implementation, GitHub App implementation, branch protection weakening, CI/CD security weakening, or runtime product code are included.
risk_result: Medium risk validation change. The smoke runner is extended to verify negative failure behavior without touching production or protected resources. All required local validations passed.
unresolved_risks: CI evidence is pending until the branch is pushed and GitHub runs checks.
Auto-merge behavior should be verified on this pull request after checks pass.
